case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. JEAN CLAUDE MUSORE ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CERTIFIED MAILED CLAIM SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-31-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE GRACE M. GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AND DEFENDANT ZOWADOE MEHN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JEAN CLAUDE MUSORE OR JACKEE RODRIGUEZ. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR ANY OF THE THREE DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE WAS UNWILLING TO HAVE THE MATTER HEARD BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
